title: Floor Memory Schema
description: Schema for validating per-floor memory records.

visit_count.description: Number of times this floor has been visited.

death_count.description: Number of player deaths on this floor.

victory_count.description: Number of times this floor was successfully cleared.

stability.description: Current stability of the floor, influencing generation.

deviation.description: Current deviation of the floor, influencing generation.

mutation_level.description: Current mutation level of the floor.

known_layout_seed.description: Seed used for generating the layout of this floor.

active_mutations.description: List of active mutations affecting this floor.

discovered_easter_eggs.description: List of discovered easter eggs on this floor.

unclaimed_easter_eggs.description: List of unclaimed easter eggs on this floor.

residue_history.description: Array of residue records associated with this floor.
